No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.

Defendant George Georgiou, Georgiou Studio, Inc., A California Corporation, 925 Bryant Inc A California Corporation Notice Of Motion For Order Rescinding Stipulation (In Part Or Entirely)
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
